since_last: 23% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads -0.24%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 23% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.37% · BTC -0.32% · Gold -1.19% · Nasdaq100 -1.37%. 23% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at -0.24%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at -0.24%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -5.14%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: OKLO is the standout at -9.67%
cards.body: Leaders: AVAV +4.51%, INTU +4.09%, ZBRA +2.74%, CRM +2.60%, WDAY +2.58%. Laggards: OKLO -9.67%, SMR -9.39%, SKHY -8.82%, CEVA -8.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.46% at $133.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.46% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
